title: trifolium pallescens
intro: Trifolium pallescens is a species of flowering plant in the pea family, commonly known as a pale clover. It is a perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of the Balkan Peninsula and Greece, and is known for its medicinal properties. The plant contains isoflavones, which have been found to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, providing health benefits such as reducing the risk of heart disease and improving bone density. In herbal preparations, Trifolium pallescens is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be consumed to support overall health and well-being.
